experience.summary: Designing Bluebird microservices for customer reservation, ensuring reliability and scalability.

Participate in the development of new Microservices. Applying the latest technology and not forgetting backwards compatibility refactoring code, clean architecture, and using design patterns where necessary. To further speed up the work process, we designed the ENERA generator (service/lib) to support speed in migrating this system.
Participate in the reliability team, to increase system efficiency create several supporting libraries. Implementing google ODRD (on-demand-rides-deliveries-solution)
Make new feature and maintenance old code, make system more stable.
I am a backend developer at a private company in South Jakarta. I am a person who is very fond of problem solving and new innovations related to the world of technology.
Revamp company website and app that can be used to ship cars throughout Indonesia.
Create company website and app that can be used to ship cars throughout Indonesia.

Enjoyed adventures and making many good friends and relationships until now.
